Container.Name: MediaFusion
Container.Overview: MediaFusion is a Stremio add-on service that aggregates scraping sources and requires PostgreSQL and Redis backends, with optional Prowlarr and Browserless integrations.
Container.Requires: MediaFusion requires PostgreSQL and Redis services. Generate SECRET_KEY with: openssl rand -hex 16 (32 hex characters). Set HOST_URL and POSTER_HOST_URL to your public URL (typically HTTPS via reverse proxy). Optional companion services from the upstream compose stack include Prowlarr and Browserless. Upstream docker-compose reference: https://github.com/mhdzumair/MediaFusion/tree/main/deployment/docker-compose

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to MediaFusion (container listens on 8000).

Config.Name: Host URL
Config.Description: Public URL users will access (include scheme, no trailing slash).

Config.Name: Poster Host URL
Config.Description: Public URL used for poster/image endpoints. Usually same as HOST_URL.

Config.Name: Contact Email
Config.Description: Contact email exposed in add-on metadata.

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Optional but recommended Prowlarr endpoint for indexer integration.

Config.Name: Scrapling CDP URL
Config.Description: Browserless websocket endpoint for scraping tasks.

Config.Name: Single Worker Mode
Config.Description: Use one consolidated queue worker mode (default upstream compose behavior).

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required security key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 16

Config.Name: API Password
Config.Description: Optional API password to secure endpoints. Strongly recommended for public instances.

Config.Name: Read Replica URI
Config.Description: Optional PostgreSQL read-replica connection string for HA deployments.
